回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文雜誌選讀 (English Magazine Reading)	開課班級 : 應英三甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
1. Develop deeper understanding and multi-faceted perceptions of the world’s cultures. 2. Explore, think, and then present to the class our response to the topic of the week. 3. Develop critical reading and thinking skills. 4. Appreciate key ideas and issues in the selected magazine articles. 5. Use and familiarize yourself with the vocabulary of the week's topic.  


2.教學綱要
Selected Readings from English Magazines is a topic-based course. Students are encouraged to interact with peers and the teacher. This course includes a wide spectrum of topics－ranging from cutting-edge technology, environmental issues, and social/cultural phenomena. Teaching and learning activities include shared reading, oral presentation, discussion of key words and ideas. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : No text book required　
出版日期 : 年 月

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Class Participation, Discussion, and Presentation 40%; Mid-term Exam: 30%; Final Exam 30% 
Students are required to work as in groups to translate the assigned reading materials.
